prompt: Preskenuj zmluvy za januar 2026 a najdi podozrive vzory

assertions.name: correct_date_range
assertions.check: The SQL queries use date_from=2026-01-01 and date_to=2026-02-01

assertions.name: all_17_queries_attempted
assertions.check: All 17 queries from the skill are executed

assertions.name: output_has_6_categories
assertions.check: Output is organized into up to 6 category sections

assertions.name: has_markdown_tables
assertions.check: Output contains markdown tables with pipe-delimited columns

assertions.name: has_summary_table
assertions.check: Output ends with a summary table listing all findings

assertions.name: has_sumar_section
assertions.check: Output starts with a Sumar section

assertions.name: no_premature_conclusions
assertions.check: Output does NOT draw final conclusions or verdicts

assertions.name: uses_datasette_api
assertions.check: Queries are executed against zmluvy.zltastopa.sk Datasette API
